title: Canonical Shared Types
description: Canonical definitions for shared logical fields (foreign-key identifiers and timestamps). Reference these instead of re-modeling ids/timestamps ad-hoc per schema, to stop cross-schema drift (#137). ForeignKeyId accepts BOTH server-generated UUID4 ids and SDK-generated trial_<hex> ids (the two real id populations).

ForeignKeyId.description: Canonical foreign-key identifier. NOT format:uuid — accepts UUID4 (server) and trial_<hex>/<optimization_id>_<n> (SDK). A format:uuid constraint on these fields rejects real SDK ids (422).
